summary: All four requirements are implemented. REQ-1: Footer Quick Links column removed, 2-column layout retained with brand info and contact details. REQ-2: Contact component removed from App.tsx (no import or render). REQ-3: OKLCH color tokens updated in index.css and tailwind.config.js with warm amber/golden primary, deep charcoal background, and bright orange-yellow accent. REQ-4: New WarrantyGuarantee.tsx component added with all three warranty items (25-year panels, 10-year inverter, 5-year service) using shield/badge icons, placed between WhyChooseUs and Services in App.tsx.
